An official website of the United States government

Here's how you know

Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock () or https:// means you've safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Explore USWDS in an Astro project

This project demonstrates how to integrate the U.S. Web Design System (USWDS) into an Astro static-site project. Browse the sections below to see components in action.

View Components

What is USWDS?

The U.S. Web Design System (USWDS) is a design system for the federal government, providing components and guidelines for building accessible, mobile-friendly government websites.

Key features

  • Accessible — meets WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards out of the box
  • Mobile-first — designed for every screen size
  • Consistent — unified design language across government websites
  • Open source — free to use, extend, and contribute

Pairing USWDS with Astro gives you a fast, content-focused static site with all the USWDS components and accessibility built in.

See all components Typography & Colors

Getting Started

  • 1. Install

    Add USWDS and Astro to your project with npm:

    npm install @uswds/uswds astro

  • 2. Copy Assets

    Run the setup script to copy USWDS assets into public/:

    npm run setup

  • 3. Use Components

    Reference USWDS CSS/JS in your Astro layout and use USWDS HTML class names in your components.
